##LOCALITY=Packrat mine, Mesa County, Colorado, USA
##OWNER=Natural History Museum of Los Angeles County
##SOURCE=Tony Kampf
##DESCRIPTION=Light green squared plated crystals commonly grouped in rosettes, associated with packratite and pharmacolite. This is the type sample described in Kampf et al (2020)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R250057
